name: TITAN INTERNATIONAL INC
sic_description: Steel Works, Blast Furnaces & Rolling Mills (Coke Ovens)
summary: Titan International, Inc. (TWI) manufactures wheels, tires, and undercarriage systems for agricultural equipment, earthmoving/construction equipment, and consumer products. The company sells to OEM customers and aftermarkets globally. Its subsidiary Titan Specialty (formerly The Carlstar Group, LLC) expands its specialty tire offerings. Products include off-highway tires and wheels used in farming, construction, and mining applications.
